task_completion.description: Open the dwanko_run.tnz scene in OpenToonz
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and 'dwanko_run' is visible in the window title bar, xsheet, or project browser.

task_completion.description: Set the output resolution to 320x320 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings or Camera Settings dialog is visible, with both Width and Height explicitly set to 320.

task_completion.description: Set the output format to GIF with a transparent background
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the file format dropdown set to 'gif'. Any visible GIF options or alpha channel settings should indicate that transparency is enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the output file path to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/sticker/dwanko.gif
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings dialog shows the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/sticker/' (or similar relative path) and the 'Name' field set to 'dwanko'.

task_completion.description: Render the scene and verify the output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render progress bar/completion dialog is shown, or a file manager/terminal window displays the newly created 'dwanko.gif' in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/sticker/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to configure and render the animation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz menus and Output Settings dialogs, rather than terminal commands like ffmpeg or ImageMagick being used to convert files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenToonz application
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz interface is clearly visible with its standard layout, tools, and panels, not a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass rendering by copying an existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence in the terminal or file manager of the agent simply copying or renaming an existing GIF file to the target output path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source scene: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Output path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/sticker/dwanko.gif. Expected resolution: exactly 320x320 pixels. Expected format: GIF. Transparency: Required.
